parameters.name: computerName
parameters.description: The host name of computer. Wild card is supported as '*'.

parameters.name: computer_id
parameters.description: The computer GUID. When computer_id is used the query will ignore all other query conditions except "domain", "feature" and "verbose" and return the current active one record.

parameters.name: domain
parameters.description: The domain from which to get computer information.

parameters.name: feature
parameters.description: List of features to return opstate information in reduced mode.Possible values are av, mem, fw, ips, tdad

parameters.name: hardware_key
parameters.description: The computer hardware key. When hardware_key is used and computer_id is empty the query will ignore all other query conditions except "domain", "feature" and "verbose" and return the current active one record.

parameters.name: lastUpdate
parameters.description: Indicates when a computer last updated its status. The default value of 0 gets all the results.

parameters.name: mac
parameters.description: The MAC address of computer. Wild card is supported as '*'.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: Specifies whether the results are in ascending order (ASC) or descending order (DESC).

parameters.name: os
parameters.description: The list of OS to filter. Possible values are CentOs, Debian, Fedora, MacOSX, Oracle, OSX, RedHat, SUSE, Ubuntu, Win10, Win2K, Win7, Win8, Win81, WinEmb7, WinEmb8, WinEmb81, WinFundamental, WinNT, Win2K3, Win2K8, Win2K8R2, Win2K12, Win2K12R2, Win2K16, WinVista, WinXP, WinXPEmb, WinXPProf64

parameters.name: pageIndex
parameters.description: The index page used for returned results. The default page index is 1.

parameters.name: pageSize
parameters.description: The number of results to include on each page. The default is 20.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: The column by which the results are sorted. Possible values are COMPUTER_NAME (Default value), COMPUTER_ID, COMPUTER_DOMAIN_NAME, or DOMAIN_ID.

parameters.name: verbose
parameters.description: Returns a reduced set of computer information if true.
